title: French Omelette
description: A simple French-inspired omelette filled with cheese and perfect for a quick, satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: cheese
ingredients.notes: Shredded, sharp cheddar or Swiss work well.

instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of butter.
Once the butter has melted, pour in the eggs.
Let the eggs cook for about 2 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
Once the eggs are almost set, add the shredded cheese to one half of the omelette.
Use the spatula to fold the other half of the omelette over the cheese.
Let the omelette cook for another minute, until the cheese is melted and the eggs are fully set.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
